subject: Fermi GBM trigger 490365157/160716523 is not a GRB
body:
Hoi-Fung Yu (MPE)
reports on behalf of the Fermi GBM Team:

"The Fermi Gamma-ray Burst Monitor (GBM) trigger 490365157/160716523
at 12:32:33.42 UT on 16 July 2016, tentatively classified as a GRB,
is in fact not due to a GRB. This trigger is due to an local particle event."
